# Fresh witness grants vote.
vote from=v1 term=a lm=a0
----
ok
w:  vote=(a, v1) acked=none

# Idempotent: same vote accepted again.
vote from=v1 term=a lm=a0
----
ok
w:  vote=(a, v1) acked=none

# Same term, different candidate: rejected (already voted).
vote from=v2 term=a lm=a0
----
rejected

# Stale term: rejected.
vote from=v2 term=a lm=a5
----
rejected

# Higher term with up-to-date log: granted.
vote from=v2 term=b lm=a0
----
ok
w:  vote=(b, v2) acked=none

# Higher term but log behind our acked hi: rejected.
# First set up some acked state.
set
term=c voted-for=v1 hi=c10 engaged=false
----
w:  vote=(c, v1) acked=(c10, released)

vote from=v2 term=d lm=c9
----
rejected

# Same scenario but candidate log is at the hi mark: granted.
vote from=v2 term=d lm=c10
----
ok
w:  vote=(d, v2) acked=(c10, released)
